# OpenDDIL Stack — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org/
# This file helps AI coding assistants understand the project.

> OpenDDIL Stack is the central HQ infrastructure repository for the OpenDDIL framework.
> It provides a Docker Compose environment running PostgreSQL, Redpanda, Restate, and ElectricSQL.
> Schema is managed declaratively with Atlas (HCL). No hand-written migrations.

## Project Purpose
OpenDDIL is a CQRS, Event-Driven architecture for DDIL (Denied, Degraded, Intermittent, Limited) environments.
It replaces legacy database replication with durable, intent-based sync.

## Architecture
- Read Path: ElectricSQL syncs Postgres → local SQLite read-cache on Edge nodes.
- Write Path: Edge nodes spool events to a local SQLite Outbox, flush to Redpanda when connected.
- Processing: Restate consumes events from Redpanda and applies them to Postgres (exactly-once).
- Contracts: Protobufs for payload compression and cross-language support (see openddil-contracts repo).

## Key Files
- docker-compose.yml: Orchestrates all HQ services (Postgres, Atlas init, Redpanda, Restate, ElectricSQL).
- schema/schema.hcl: Atlas declarative schema defining inventory_items and audit_log tables.
- electric/electrify.sql: PostgreSQL PUBLICATION + REPLICATION config for ElectricSQL Shape API.
- README.md: Quick-start guide, service endpoints, Expand/Contract migration docs.
- AGENTS.md: AI agent workflow guidelines and safety constraints.
- .cursorrules: Coding style and tech stack conventions for AI assistants.

## Tech Stack
- PostgreSQL 16 (wal_level=logical)
- Atlas (arigaio/atlas) — declarative schema-as-code
- Redpanda (Kafka-compatible, no Zookeeper)
- Restate (durable, exactly-once event processing)
- ElectricSQL (read-path sync via HTTP Shape API)
- Protobufs (event contract serialization, defined in openddil-contracts)
- Docker Compose

## Polyrepo Structure
- openddil-stack (this repo): Docker Compose, Atlas schemas, server infra.
- openddil-contracts: Language-agnostic Protobuf schemas.
- openddil-edge-dotnet: .NET Edge SDK (Outbox + Relay).
- openddil-edge-python: Python Edge SDK (Outbox + Relay).
- openddil-hq-dotnet: .NET HQ SDK (Restate handlers).
- openddil-hq-python: Python HQ SDK (Restate handlers).
- openddil-sensor-ingest: Sensor Ingestion Gateway & Legacy Bridge (Phase 7.1).

## Schema Evolution Rules
1. EXPAND: Add new columns/tables. Old consumers still work. Deploy the schema first.
2. DEPLOY: Update HQ processors and Edge SDKs to use the new fields.
3. CONTRACT: Remove old columns/tables only after all consumers have migrated.

## ElectricSQL Notes
- Modern ElectricSQL (v0.9+) is read-path only. No ELECTRIC ENABLE DDL.
- Tables are exposed via HTTP Shape API: GET /v1/shape?table=inventory_items&offset=-1
- Only inventory_items is published. audit_log is HQ-only (not synced to Edge).
